sections.1: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

1.en: The report is not like witnessing
1.hi: Suni hui baat apni aankhon se dekhne jaisi nahi hoti.

1.en: War is deception
1.hi: Jang hikmat aur tadbeer ka naam hai.

1.en: A Muslim is a mirror of the Muslim
1.hi: Ek Musalman dusre Musalman ka aaina hota hai.

1.en: Someone whose advice is sought is in a position of trust
1.hi: Jis shakhs se mashwara liya jaye, woh amanatdaar hota hai.

1.en: The person guiding (someone) to do a good deed, is like the one performing the good deed
1.hi: Jo kisi ko nek kaam ki taraf rahnumai karta hai, usse bhi us nek amal karne wale jitna sawab milta hai.

1.en: Seek help for any needs discreetly
1.hi: Apni zarooraton ko poora karne ke liye raazdari ikhtiyar karo.

1.en: Protect yourself from the fire even with a part of a date
1.hi: Jahannam ki aag se bacho, chahe aadhi khajoor sadaqah karke hi kyon na ho.

1.ar: الدُّنْیَا سِجْنُ الْمُؤمِنِ وَ جَنَّةُ الْکَافِرِ
1.en: The world is the believer’s prison and the disbeliever’s paradise
1.hi: Duniya Momin ke liye qaidkhana hai aur kafir ke liye jannat hai.

1.en: Modesty is entirely good
1.hi: Haya poori ki poori bhalai hai.

1.en: The word of the believer is like seizing of the hand
1.hi: Momin ka wada haath pakadne ki tarah mazboot hota hai.

1.ar: لَا یَحِلُّ لِمُؤمِنٍ اَنْ یَّجُهْرَ أخَاهُ فَوقَ ثَلَاثَةِ أیَّامٍ
1.en: It is unlawful for a believer to sever relations with his brother for more than three days
1.hi: Kisi Momin ke liye jaiz nahi ke woh apne Musalman bhai se teen din se zyada taalluq tod kar rakhe.

1.en: He is not one of us who cheats us
1.hi: Jo hume dhokha de, woh hum mein se nahi hai.

1.ar: مَا قَلَّ وَكَفَى خَيْرٌ مِمَّا كَثُرَ وَأَلْهَى
1.en: A little that suffices is better than an abundance that distracts
1.hi: Thoda maal jo zaroorat poori kar de, us zyada maal se behtar hai jo Allah ki yaad se ghafil kar de.

1.ar: الرَّاجِعُ فِيْ هِبَتِهِ کَالرَّاجِعِ فِيْ قَیْئِهِ
1.en: Someone who takes back his gift is like someone who eats his vomit
1.hi: Jo shakhs apna diya hua tohfa wapas leta hai, woh us shakhs ki tarah hai jo apni ulti ko dobara kha leta hai.

1.en: Affliction comes from (loose) talk
1.hi: Bala aur museebat aksar be-sochi samjhi baaton ki wajah se aati hai.

1.en: People are like the teeth of a comb
1.hi: Log kanghi ke daanton ki tarah barabar hain.

1.en: Richness lies in the richness of the soul
1.hi: Asal daulat dil ki be-niyazi aur qana'at mein hai.

1.en: The felicitous person takes lessons from (the actions of) others
1.hi: Khush naseeb woh hai jo dusron ke haal se naseehat hasil kare.

1.ar: وَ إِنَّ مِنَ الشِّعْرِ لَحِکْمَةً وَاِنَّ مِنَ الْبَیَانِ لَسِحْرًا
1.en: Indeed, in poetry there is wisdom and in eloquence there is magic
1.hi: Beshak kuch shayari mein hikmat hoti hai aur kuch bayan mein aisa asar hota hai jaise jadoo.

1.en: The king’s pardon preserves the kingdom
1.hi: Badshah ka maaf kar dena uski hukumat ke qayam ka sabab banta hai.

1.en: A man will be with whom he loves
1.hi: Insaan usi ke saath hoga jisse woh muhabbat karta hai.

1.en: A man who knows his worth will not be ruined
1.hi: Jo apni aukaat aur maqam ko pehchan leta hai, woh kabhi halakat mein nahi padta.

1.en: The child belongs to the bed and stoning is for the adulterer
1.hi: Baccha usi ka maana jayega jiske nikah ke bistar par paida hua ho, aur zina karne wale ke liye sirf saza hai.

1.ar: الْیَدُ الْعُلْیَا خَیْرٌ مِّنَ الْیَدِ السُّفْلَی
1.en: The upper hand is superior to the lower hand
1.hi: Dene wala haath lene wale haath se behtar hai.

1.ar: لَا شَکَرَ اللهَ مَنْ لَّا یَشْکُرُ النَّاسَ
1.en: He does not thank Allah who does not thank people
1.hi: Jo logon ka shukriya ada nahi karta, woh Allah ka bhi shukr ada nahi karta.

1.en: Your love of something can blind and deafen (you)
1.hi: Kisi cheez ki muhabbat insaan ko andha aur behra bana deti hai.

1.ar: جُبِلَتِ الْقُلُوبُ عَلی حُبَّ مَنْ اَحْسَنَ اِلَیْهَا وَ بُغْضِ مَنْ اَسَاءَ اِلَیْهَا
1.en: Hearts are predisposed to love someone who does them good and detest someone who does them harm
1.hi: Dil us shakhs se muhabbat karta hai jo uske saath bhalai kare aur us se nafrat karta hai jo uske saath bura sulook kare.

1.ar: الْتَّائِبُ مِنَ الذَّنْبِ کَمَنْ لَا ذَنْبَ لَهُ
1.en: One who repents from sin is like someone without sin
1.hi: Jo shakhs apne gunahon se sacchi tauba kar leta hai, woh us shakhs ki tarah hai jisne kabhi gunah hi na kiya ho.

1.ar: الشَّاهِدُ یَرَی مَا لَا یَرَاهُ الْغَائِبُ
1.en: The person who actually witnesses an (event) sees that which one who is absent does not
1.hi: Jo khud kisi waqia ka gawah hota hai, woh us baat ko zyada behtar jaanta hai jo ghair hazir shakhs nahi jaanta.

1.en: If the nobleman of a people comes to you, honour him
1.hi: Jab kisi qaum ka izzat wala shakhs tumhare paas aaye to uski izzat karo.

1.en: False oaths lay waste to home (lands)
1.hi: Jhooti qasam gharon aur bastiyon ki barkat ko khatam kar deti hai.

1.ar: مَنْ قُتِلَ دُونَ مَالِهِ فَهُوَ شَهِیْدٌ
1.en: Whoever is killed attempting to save his property is a martyr
1.hi: Jo apne maal ki hifazat karte hue qatl kar diya jaye, woh shaheed hai.

1.en: Actions are through intentions
1.hi: Har amal ka dar-o-madar niyyat par hai.

1.en: The leader of a people is their servant
1.hi: Kisi qaum ka asal sardar woh hai jo unki khidmat kare.

1.en: The best of affairs is that which is balanced
1.hi: Har kaam mein behtareen tareeqa i'tedaal aur darmiyani raasta ikhtiyar karna hai.

1.ar: اَللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ فِیْ أُمَّتِیْ فِی بُکُوْرِهَا یَوْمَ الْخَمِیْسِ
1.en: O Allah, bless my nation in its early rising on Thursdays
1.hi: Aye Allah! Meri ummat ke liye Jumeraat ki subah ke waqt mein barkat ata farma.

1.en: Poverty can almost turn into disbelief
1.hi: Faqr aur tangdasti insaan ko kufr ke qareeb le ja sakti hai.

1.en: Travelling is a portion of punishment
1.hi: Safar azaab ka ek hissa hai.

1.en: The best of provision is God-Consciousness (taqwa)
1.hi: Sabse behtareen zakhira taqwa hai.

1.en: Meetings are under trust
1.hi: Majlis ki baatein amanat hoti hain.
